system.description: Exotic dust seized from a far country by Trebizond, the princess Paladin who serves Saint George. This special belonging allows Trebizond to detect and track magical presences. As part of her 'From a Far Country' Gift, once per scene she can create special equipment like this Magic-Finding Dust or A Whip as Sharp as a Blade. When using her special equipment, Trebizond increases her Opposition Level by 1, making her particularly dangerous to Hunters who rely on magical abilities.
